subject: [PATCH v3 0/4] cleanup: Remove NULL check from unconditional guards

reviews.author: Miguel Ojeda
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch and provided an Acked-by tag after Dmitry addressed his concerns.
reviews.raw_body:
On Tue, May 19, 2026 at 1:54 PM Dmitry Ilvokhin <d@ilvokhin.com> wrote:
>
> Thanks, fixed locally.

Sounds good, thanks!

Acked-by: Miguel Ojeda <ojeda@kernel.org>

Cheers,
Miguel

2026-05-19.patch_summary: This patch series aims to remove dead NULL checks from unconditional guard destructors in the Linux kernel. The patches prepare guards that handle NULL, add __nonnull() attributes to constructors for compile-time enforcement, and finally remove the unnecessary NULL checks.
